name: Purple Passion Jiggle Shots
recipeIngredient: 1 dash vodka (either a shots-worth or a tablespoon would do)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Jell-O, boiling water, amaretto, and vodka in a bowl until combined.
2. Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
3. Pour into 2-ounce cups or a large pan and chill thoroughly.
4. If using a large pan, cut the chilled mixture into smaller 2-ounce servings before serving.
(Note: These shooters were sent by Vickey to Nancy Pallota on the Country email list. Please consume these shots cautiously due to their strength.)
